name: Madhur's Rice with Peas & Carrots,flavored with Cardamom
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the rice in a bowl and wash it several times with water. Drain well.
2. Cover the rice with fresh water and soak for at least 25 minutes (longer is fine).
3. Drain the rice and transfer to a strainer set over a bowl.
4. Peel and trim the carrots, then cut into sticks and dice them into 1/4-inch cubes.
5. Heat oil in a heavy medium-sized pot over medium-high heat. When hot, add cardamoms, cinnamon, and cloves. Stir once or twice.
6. Add the onion pieces and fry until they turn slightly brown.
7. Add the carrot pieces and stir for about one minute.
8. Add the drained rice to the pot and continue stirring. If the rice sticks, reduce heat slightly.
9. Cook the rice in oil for 2 minutes, or until it becomes translucent and is well coated with oil.
10. Pour in the chicken broth (add 3/4 tsp salt). Bring to a boil.
11. Cover the pot and turn the heat down to very low. Cook for 20 minutes.
12. Lift the lid, quickly add the peas, then cover again. Cook for an additional 5-10 minutes, or until the peas are tender.
13. Gently mix the rice before serving.
